title: URAファイナルズ決勝の後に

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
You did it,
Trainer <username>.
In impressive style, no less.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I know, Meek. It's frustrating... Terribly so.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But at the same time, your training and your
trainee's running inspired us,
Trainer <username>!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Someday... I'll shine too. Just as bright.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>...
You're my rival—one I wholeheartedly respect.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: So when I say this, I mean it... Congratulations!
